scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd dist && git init -q -b gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -q -m deploy && git push -f git@github.com:sash/gridlock.git gh-pages && cd .. && rm -rf dist/.git
scripts.build:native: vite build -c vite.native.config.ts && cp dist-native/index.html native/assets/game.html
